name: tecpey-os
description: TecPey Financial Education and Digital Asset Operating System

scripts.prod:build: npm ci --no-audit --no-fund && npm run env:check && npm run build
scripts.ai:redteam:check: npm run ai:trust:check && npm run test:ai-mentor-trust
scripts.test:withdrawal-admission: NODE_PATH=src/tests/stubs NODE_ENV=test node --import tsx --test --test-force-exit 'src/tests/security/withdrawal-admission*.test.ts' 'src/tests/security/withdrawal-external-effect*.test.ts' 'src/tests/security/withdrawal-price-producer.test.ts' 'src/tests/security/withdrawal-settlement-postgres.test.ts' && npm run test:withdrawal-read-authority
scripts.test:community-reputation: npm run community:reputation:check && NODE_PATH=src/tests/stubs NODE_ENV=test node --conditions=react-server --import tsx --test --test-force-exit src/tests/security/community-reputation-evidence-client.test.ts src/tests/security/community-reputation-evidence-postgres.integration.ts
scripts.test:community-journal-discipline: npm run community:journal-discipline:check && NODE_PATH=src/tests/stubs NODE_ENV=test node --conditions=react-server --import tsx --test --test-force-exit src/tests/security/community-journal-discipline-score-policy.test.ts src/tests/security/community-journal-discipline-score-client.test.ts src/tests/security/community-journal-discipline-score-postgres.integration.ts
scripts.test:ops-staging-evidence: npm run ops:staging:evidence:check && NODE_ENV=test node --import tsx --test --test-force-exit src/tests/security/community-challenge-host-evidence.test.ts src/tests/security/community-challenge-host-collector.test.ts
scripts.test:ops-scheduler: npm run ops:scheduler:check && npm run ops:staging:evidence:check && NODE_PATH=src/tests/stubs NODE_ENV=test node --conditions=react-server --import tsx --test --test-force-exit src/tests/security/community-challenge-scheduler.integration.ts src/tests/security/operational-alert-spool.integration.ts src/tests/security/operational-job-evidence-postgres.integration.ts src/tests/security/community-challenge-host-evidence-postgres.integration.ts src/tests/security/community-challenge-scheduler-installer.test.ts
scripts.test:sensitive-mutation-audit: NODE_ENV=test node --import tsx --test --test-force-exit src/tests/security/sensitive-mutation-audit-routes.test.ts src/tests/security/sensitive-mutation-audit-postgres.test.ts src/tests/security/api-key-transactional-audit-postgres.test.ts src/tests/security/password-rotation-audit-postgres.test.ts src/tests/security/two-factor-transactional-audit-postgres.test.ts src/tests/security/two-factor-verification-authority-postgres.test.ts src/tests/security/webauthn-transactional-audit-postgres.test.ts && npm run test:community-profile-consent && npm run test:community-reputation && npm run test:community-journal-discipline && npm run test:ops-scheduler && npm run test:ops-staging-evidence
scripts.npm:registry:fix: npm config set registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm config delete proxy || true && npm config delete https-proxy || true
scripts.clean:hard: rm -rf node_modules .next package-lock.json && npm cache clean --force
scripts.release:check: npm run env:check && npm run check && npm run ui:check && npm run ui:public:check && npm run redis:safety:check && npm run test:redis-safety && npm run auth:check && npm run test:auth-session && npm run ai:redteam:check && npm run custody:check && npm run test:custody-gate && npm run withdrawals:check && npm run test:withdrawal-admission && npm run risk:check && npm run test:risk-enforcement && npm run test:api-command-idempotency && npm run audit:sensitive:check && npm run test:sensitive-mutation-audit && npm run community:reputation:check && npm run test:community-reputation && npm run community:journal-discipline:check && npm run test:community-journal-discipline && npm run ops:scheduler:check && npm run test:ops-scheduler && npm run ops:staging:evidence:check && npm run test:ops-staging-evidence && npm run offline:check && npm run test:offline-sync && npm run academy:progress:check && npm run test:academy-progress && npm run crm:check && npm run test:crm-leads && npm run exchange:check && npm run test:exchange-order-authority && npm run bounded-body:check && npm run test:bounded-body && npm run api:security:check && npm run test:api-security-manifest && npm run notifications:check && npm run notifications:runtime:check && npm run notifications:producers:check && npm run notifications:domain:check && npm run build && npm run ui:runtime:prod
scripts.qa:core: npm run qa:academy-core && npm run qa:offline-core && npm run qa:phase5-core && npm run qa:phase6-core
